race.comment: BOHEMIAN RHAPSODY (1) resumes looking well placed. Two runs in his maiden campaign were in Listed company, third at Flemington on debut when just behind subsequent Blue Diamond winner Streisand. He's been gelded now, has won a trial impressively and looks the one. OXFORD STREET (6) and OBAMBULATE (5) both debuted in the same race at Caulfield Heath. OXFORD STREET was a much bigger price but found the line well for third, OBAMBULATE was in the market and only a length further behind. Doubt there's too much between the pair again. LADY OF POMPEII (9) is a filly by Brazen Beau on debut for the Hayes yard who has trialled well enough and has claims. TERRACOTTA WARRIOR (7) is a Saxon Warrior gelding on debut for the Price & Kent Jnr yard who should be respected.
